[[File:UpdatedFriendspages.png|thumb]]
The '''Tree Town''' displays all of your Finch friends. Add other Finch users, using their friend code or link, and interact with them. The Tree town is used to give each other support and encouragement. You can see see your friend in their birbhouse, send [[Good Vibes]] and gifts, invite them to be a [[Goal Buddies|Goal Buddy]] and see their latest in-game discoveries. (Other users cannot see your personal writings.)

==Overview== 
You can add friends in multiple ways, like [[Invite|inviting]] them to join the app or using their friend code to add them to your tree. After adding friends, you can arrange them in your tree. Each day, the first time you send Good Vibes to a friend, you will get 3 [[Energy]] and 2 [[Rainbow Stones]]. 

Finch will give you options to set goals about them such as, "tell *insertname* you care about them." (Separately, the game keeps a history of people you have sent Good Vibes to, under the list of goals you have accomplished today. Go to the Home tab and click the calendar icon above your goals for today on the main page, then scroll to the bottom.)

When you reply to a Good Vibe from them, you can invite your friend's birb to come over. It will accompany yours for about an hour, whether your birb is on an adventure, enjoying the outdoors, or at home in the birbhouse. You can also pet other people's birbs, which doesn't do much but is incredibly cute.

If you want to find more friends, try the wiki's [[Friend Code Exchange]]. You can also visit various [[Official Finch Communities]] which are linked in the game (Discord, Facebook, Reddit, etc) to find many other people also seeking friends.<ref>Other [[Official Finch Communities| communities]] menu: {{Clear}}<gallery>
File:ConnecttoCommunitiesButton.jpg|scroll down in the settings menu
File:Menu-Hamburger-Communities.png|links to communities
</gallery>{{Clear}}</ref>  

=== Finding Your Friends in the Tree ===
Your Birb is in the middle of the tree. You can see up to eight other friends' birbs around yours on one page. However, you can also add more friends, and they will appear on new pages in Tree Town. You generally can add an unlimited amount of friends, but the app may start to get slow.
[[File:See-all-Finch-friends.jpg|thumb]]
If you have more than eight friends, you will see a white oval near the bottom of the tree trunk which shows which page of friends you are viewing, and one or more outlined white circles next to it to represent the other pages of friends. You can find your newer friends in Tree Town by going to the tree trunk, pressing on an outlined white circle (usually to the right of your current page), then swiping in direction you want to go to.

=== Ask for Hug ===
[[File:TreeTownTopRiģht.jpg|thumb]][[File:Askforahug.jpg|thumb]]
You can ask for a hug by clicking onto the birb holding a heart at the top of the page. Your birb town friends will get a "user" asked for hug and can give you one eventually. You can't ask for a hug extremely often though.

===Check all incoming vibes at once=== 
Click the heart at the top right of your Tree Town to see all of your incoming vibes at once, divided by person. You can respond to each one here. This is the alternative to individually clicking a birb with a heart showing, which will pull up all the good vibes from just that person.
=== Settings ===
[[File:Treetownsettings.jpg|thumb]]There are multiple Settings you can choose from when you click the grey gear in the top right corner:
* Edit your tree town and rearrange birbs on multiple display pages (you can also unfriend individuals through this interface. They won't be notified.)
* Allow or disable Good Vibes
* Allow or disable Push notifications 
* Allow or disable friend requests

== Friend Pages ==
When you click your friend's birb on your tree town, you will see your friend's birb in their birbhouse. The birb page has a lot of information and options.  
=== Friendship level ===
:''Main article: [[Friendship]]'' [[File:Treetownfriendshiplevels.jpg|thumb]]
In the top right corner of your friend's page, click the heart to see your friendship level with them. You can build friendship levels with your tree town friends by sending each other good vibes regularly and supporting each other! You only get rainbow stones and energy as rewards for the first time you send a good vibe to them that day.  

===Friend settings=== 
The dots in the top right corner next to the heart lead to some options:  
* Edit the Name of the user
* Unfriend the user (when unfriending, you can either block future friend requests or accept future friend requests)
* Mute future good vibes from the user
* Change the emoji

=== Send Good Vibes ===
:''Main article: [[Good Vibes]]'' 
You can send good vibes to birb friends as well as receive them. The first time you do it everyday you get 2 rainbow stones and 3 energy. Later you won't get more rainbow stones, but you can continue to send Good Vibes to your friend whenever you want, to encourage them. It will also build a [[Friendship]] level with them. If you send them a good vibe, they will see that "user" send them a good vibe or visited them. When sending good vibes, you can choose between different good vibes. Some of them are free for all users while others are only usable for [[Finch Plus]] users. When clicking on your Tree Town you can also see which users send you good vibes since they have a speech bubble with a red heart in it over their birb. You can also clear all good vibes from a friend or from all friends in general. If you didn't respond to a good vibe for three days, the app will send you an reminder under your tree. It will stay there till you either delete it, or send a good vibe back.  

=== Send Gift ===
[[File:Exclusiveitemwarning.jpg|thumb]]
Users can send each other gifts. Its important to note that you can only send clothes, furniture, and micropets, no colors to other users. You can send multiple presents a day, but only one a day to the same user. Also each time you gift something, it costs 200 rainbow stones extra. If you decide to send a seasonal item, the app will warn you that its a limited item you will not be able to purchase again. That's only half true as seasonal times are only available during either October or December. After you searched the item you want to gift, you can choose the color you want the present box to have. The friend you send a gift to then gets an information that "user" send you a gift. If you don't like the item you got, you can sell it for half of its original price. 

==Goal buddy== 
:''Main article: [[Goal Buddies]]'' [[File:BuddyGoalsandShareyourProgress.png|thumb]]
'''New!''' Invite your friend to partner with you on a goal. The idea is to encourage each other to accomplish a specific goal. You can see how your friend is doing, and they can see your daily progress as well.

=== Goal Accountability ===
[[File:GoalAccountability .jpg|thumb]]When your friends share their daily goal with you, you can see where your friends are working on a streak and for what goal. And also how many days this goal streak is already going on. You can encourage your friends to keep their streak for each goal. After they completed the goal on that day, you are able to praise them for their progress. It's also possible to unfollow their daily goal as well if you wish.

You yourself can share goals with your friends by clicking on the want to start a buddy goal and then on just share your progress with them. 
==Latest progress== 
Scroll down to see four of your friend's most recent experiences and when they happened, such as: 
* Hatched a new micropet
* Discovered something 
* Traveled to a new location 
* Birb grew up to the next [[Stages of Growth|growth stage]]
